form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 36-day let-up. First-up after four months sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at this track on March 5 over 1400m, 15 len behind G T Rapid with 54kg at $10.10. Previously second-up 7th of 12 at Urawa on October 27 over 1500m, 10 len behind Meisho Seoto carrying 52kg at $10.10. Needs to do a lot more.
